chunks.en: At home, I usually sort the trash into burnable, plastic, and cans before collection day.
chunks.ja: 家では収集日の前に、たいてい燃えるゴミ、プラスチック、缶に分けています。

chunks.en: The schedule I follow puts burnable trash on Monday and Thursday, and recyclables on Wednesday.
chunks.ja: 僕が守っているスケジュールでは、燃えるゴミが月曜と木曜、資源ゴミが水曜です。

chunks.en: One time I totally forgot the day and had to chase the truck down the street.
chunks.ja: 一度は曜日をすっかり忘れて、通りを走ってトラックを追いかけるはめになりました。

chunks.en: The one thing that makes it easier for me is a reminder app that buzzes each night.
chunks.ja: 僕にとって楽にしてくれる工夫の一つは、毎晩鳴るリマインダーアプリです。

outline: Opening: how I sort trash at home
Point 1: the weekly burnable and recyclable schedule
Point 2: the time I nearly missed the truck
Wrap-up: a reminder app that makes it easier

modelTalk.text: So, let me walk you through how I deal with rubbish at home. I've got separate bins for burnable stuff, plastics, and cans. Honestly, it's not that hard once you get into the habit. In my area, burnable trash goes out on Tuesdays and Fridays, and recyclables only on Wednesdays. I usually take the bags down before eight, or I'll miss the truck completely. One morning I totally forgot the day. I heard the truck rumbling outside and ran down in my slippers! I made it, but only just. What I love is that our building's got a covered spot, so bags don't blow around. The annoying part? Rinsing out greasy containers before I recycle them. It's a pain, but if I skip it, they get rejected. So I'd rather do it right the first time than deal with the hassle later, you know?

chunks.en: So today I want to walk you through how I deal with taking out the trash on collection day.
chunks.ja: では今日は、収集日にゴミ出しをどうこなしているかを順を追ってお話ししたいと思います。

chunks.en: At home, I sort everything into burnable stuff, plastics, and cans and bottles in separate bins.
chunks.ja: 家では、燃えるゴミ、プラスチック、缶とビンを別々の箱に分けて全部仕分けしています。

chunks.en: To be honest, one time I totally forgot the day and had to chase the truck down the street.
chunks.ja: 正直に言うと、一度すっかり曜日を忘れて、通りでトラックを追いかける羽目になったんです。

chunks.en: What really makes it easier for me is a calendar app that pings me the night before.
chunks.ja: 私にとって本当に楽になるのは、前の晩に通知してくれるカレンダーアプリなんです。

outline: Opening: introduce trash-out routine on collection day
Point 1: how I sort trash and the weekly schedule
Point 2: the time I nearly missed the truck
Wrap-up: reminder app makes it much easier

modelTalk.text: Okay, so let me walk you through how I deal with the rubbish at home. First off, I've got separate bins under the sink. One's for burnable stuff, and the other's for recyclables like bottles and cans. To be honest, sorting it all can be a bit of a faff. Where I live, burnable trash goes out on Tuesdays and Fridays, and recyclables get picked up on Wednesdays. The truck comes ridiculously early, like half seven. Actually, there was this one time I completely blanked on the day. I heard the truck rumbling down the street, so I sprinted out in my pyjamas and just about made it. Talk about cutting it fine! That said, the thing that really winds me up is rinsing out greasy containers before recycling them. It's such a hassle. What makes life easier, though, is a little magnet on my fridge with the schedule. Honestly, I'd forget everything without it.
